parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, workflow_name, payload)
VALUES ('infra_error', $1, $2::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.workflow?.name || '', JSON.stringify({ workflow_id: $json.workflow?.id || '', workflow_name: $json.workflow?.name || '', execution_id: $json.execution?.id || '', retry_of: $json.execution?.retryOf || null, last_node: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted || '', error_message: $json.execution?.error?.message || '', error_stack: $json.execution?.error?.stack || '', test_run_id: $json.test_run_id || $json.execution?.error?.test_run_id || null })] }}
